---
title: "Minority & Woman-Owned Business"
---

*Last updated: 2025*

## Certification

Pine Straw Distributors LLC is a woman-owned small business (WOSB). We are committed to
the values of diversity, equity, and inclusion in all aspects of our business operations.

## Why It Matters

Working with certified minority and woman-owned businesses supports economic equity and
helps government agencies and corporations meet supplier diversity goals.

## Certifications

Information regarding our current certifications and registration status is available
upon request. Please contact us at jane@pinestrwadistributors.com for documentation
supporting procurement or contracting needs.
